titleStmt.title: SII 39.37: original edition by K. Karuppiah
No. 37. (A.R. No. 37 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE THIRD PILLAR IN THE SAME CAVE, SUNDRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA-20+2 = 22ND YEAR.

summary.p: This inscription registers an order of Vikramaśingadēvaṇ, to collect the taxes due from certain shepherds and made to the temple of Śivadharmīśvara-muḍaiya-Nāyaṉār of Tirukkōḷakkuḍi for buring lamps and offerings. The above gift was made for the health of the king [Uḻaguḍaiya-Nāyaṉār]. Signatories like Vikramasiṅgadēvaṉ, Teṉṉavataṟaiyaṉ and Nagula-Nāḍāḻvaṉ are mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī śrīsundarapā
ṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 2 10 Āvatiṉetiriraṇṭāvatu vik
kiramaciṅkatevaṉolai tirukkoḷakkuṭi tā
ṟku taṅkaḷūril paḻaya Iṭayaril koḷamāta
ṉuḷḷiṭṭārum koḷaṉ poṉṉa ṭṭā
rum koḷaṉ koḷaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭārum ḷan Āticaṉ
periyāṉuḷḷiṭṭāru muvan tevaṉuḷḷiṭṭārum
munpu piḷḷaiyār kuṭutta ko ru piṉṉar
Uḷḷiṭṭārum muvan Eḻuvaṉuḷḷiṭṭāru Ivan
kaṉ Araṭṭaṉum Uṭaiyār śiva dharmmiśvaramuṭaya nāyanāṟ
ku namakkivarkaḷ nāṭṭopātiyiṟukkak ka Iṟai kuṭimaika
ḷum kuṭikkalamuḷpaṭa maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉa Ulaku
ṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumeṉikku naṉṟāka tirunantā viḷakkum tayi
ramutu pālamutukkumākak kuṭuttu Ippaṭi candrādittyavaṟ celvatāka
k kallilum cempilum veṭṭik koḷka I vikrama
ciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku teṉṉavataraiyan Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai nakulanāṭāḻvān Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 39.37 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
